Introduction
A Cryptography Guide

Zero Knowledge
Proofs

The cryptographic primitive that lets you prove knowledge of a secret without ever revealing it. Covers theory, protocols, zkSNARKs, zkSTARKs, and real-world applications.

Written by Jagannath K N, Aparna K, and Utkarsh Tyagi. Supervised by Prof. Satyanarayana Reddy, mentored by Suryansh Musunuru. Shiv Nadar University, Summer 2026.
